post.caption:
Getting shallow answers from AI? 🤔

Always ask Claude to show its work step-by-step. You'll spot mistakes quicker and actually learn something new.

Try it on your next question! 💡

#ClaudeAI #AITips #ProductivityHack

story_data.tip_text: Ask Claude to explain its reasoning step-by-step
story_data.subtext: You'll catch errors faster and understand the logic behind every answer.
